# MMDSS Project Setup Instructions

## Checklist

- [x] Create copilot-instructions.md and initialize workspace structure
- [ ] Scaffold Next.js 14+ TypeScript project
- [ ] Install all required dependencies
- [ ] Configure TailwindCSS with Magnus Copo colors
- [ ] Set up Prisma schema with User model
- [ ] Create folder structure and core files
- [ ] Configure NextAuth.js v5 with RBAC
- [ ] Initialize Git repository

## Project Overview
MMDSS (Magnus Recruitment Management System) - Enterprise staffing operations platform

## Tech Stack
- Next.js 14+ (App Router, Server Actions)
- TypeScript (strict mode)
- PostgreSQL (NeonDB/Supabase) with Prisma ORM
- NextAuth.js v5 (Auth.js) with RBAC
- TailwindCSS + shadcn/ui
- React Hook Form + Zod
- TanStack Query
- date-fns
- next-safe-action
